start_msg: Hello! This bot protects public chats from spam bots. Please prove you're not a robot by completing the challenge shown below
no_captcha_requested: You did not request a CAPTCHA. Please send /start command
temp_block: Sorry, you've been temporarily blocked! Please try again later
verified: Successfully verified! You can go back to the chat
welcome_msg: Hello, {0}! I'm an anti-spam bot. Please press the button below and solve a CAPTCHA challenge to join the chat
hint_math: Solve the expression and send the answer as a number
hint_text: Type the characters shown in the image (case-insensitive)
hint_sequence: Find the missing number in the sequence and send it
hint_shapes: Count the circles in the image and send the total as a number
